rulings.Case Title: PAUL R BARNES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Digestive Testing Of Lung Tissue Samples
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Friday, October 15, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Novelis Corp.'s motion to compel digestive testing is granted. Plaintiffs have not shown they would be prejudiced by the proposed testing. Nor is Novelis required to seek approval of any other defendant to proceed as they seek to do. All remaining defendants have been served with the motion and none has opposed it. General Order No. 41 does not bar this motion. = (220/HEK)
